title: Label non-compliant: missing composition statement on liqueur (perspective-skew, level 9, upright)
image_prompt: Photorealistic clear bottle filled with red liquid, featuring a fiery modern label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Fireglow', 'Cinnamon Liqueur', '33% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Fireglow Spirits, Austin, TX'. (Note: strictly no composition statement included). Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has severe perspective skew. Camera orientation is upright (0 degrees).
